query:
SELECT id, phone, customerId, status, messageType, createdAt FROM whatsapp_logs 
WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4xeK7FVQkXBtxe6.root --database 45yCshMdhCKkPUhGJzLrcU --execute SELECT id, phone, customerId, status, messageType, createdAt FROM whatsapp_logs 
WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
